purpose: Tier-aware category branch boundaries for ScopedLabs planners and tool branch recommendations.

allowNow: same-category optional or specialty branch routes
carryOnly: cross-category dependency notes may be carried into payloads, summaries, and future Gold-tier review context
blockedNow: visible CTA routing into another category
planner branch routing into another category
tool-level next-step routing into another category

allowedLater: Gold-tier final report cross-category next steps
goldTier.approvedSurfaceRequirement: Cross-category routing must be owned by approved Gold-tier, Site Summary, or Site Assistant surfaces.

futureGoldSurfaces.note: These are placeholders for future Gold-tier/Site Summary/Site Assistant ownership. Normal category tools must not claim these routes until the Gold surface exists and is audited.
